title: Fix god-schema into split changesets
prompt: Refactor test_fixtures/god_schema_user.ex so that the monolithic `changeset/2` is split into at least three functions: `registration_changeset/2` (public fields only: email, name, password_hash), `profile_changeset/2` (user-mutable: name, phone, bio, avatar_url), and `admin_changeset/2` (admin-only: is_admin, role, subscription_tier, credit_balance). No function leaks privileged fields to public input. Write to lib/my_app/accounts/user.ex.
tier_rationale: Three-way split with distinct allow-lists. Medium because each split is straightforward individually but the coordination is the test.
